summary: Sync and async clients share proxy semantics through util::proxy CONNECT construction and response parsing while retaining separate connector implementations. End-to-end tests verify HTTP target over HTTPS proxy and HTTPS target over HTTPS proxy for both sync and async paths.

source_refs.claim: Shared connect_request and parse_tunnel_response define CONNECT request construction and 2xx tunnel success parsing.
Sync connector imports and uses shared connect_request/parse_tunnel_response while independently establishing TCP, proxy TLS, CONNECT tunnel, and origin TLS.

Async connector imports and uses shared connect_request/parse_tunnel_response while independently establishing async TCP, proxy TLS, CONNECT tunnel, and origin TLS; HTTP/3 over proxy is explicitly rejected.
Sync end-to-end tests configure HTTPS proxy TLS separately from origin TLS, verify absolute-form HTTP proxy request, and verify CONNECT 204 plus tunneled origin TLS request.
Async end-to-end tests configure HTTPS proxy TLS separately from origin TLS, verify absolute-form HTTP proxy request, and verify CONNECT 204 plus tunneled origin TLS request.

commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_sync_https_proxy_tls --no-default-features --features sync,async,http1_1,tokio_base,c_openssl_3_0 -- --nocapture --test-threads=1
commands.notes: The sync test requires async with tokio_base because crate::runtime re-exports tokio types only under all(feature = "tokio_base", feature = "async").

commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_async_https_proxy_tls --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base,c_openssl_3_0 -- --nocapture --test-threads=1

representation_boundary: It is accurate to claim shared proxy semantics, configuration shape, CONNECT request construction, and tunnel response parsing. It is not accurate to claim sync and async share one connection-establishment implementation; those remain separate connector paths.
